gaps.title: Endpoint submit is a local form action
gaps.closureRule: Consequence now requires RouteIntentBinding, CommandActionRecord, EndpointDecisionActionRecord, EndpointDecisionSettlement, and same-shell recovery.

gaps.title: Stale draft still looks live
gaps.closureRule: DecisionEpoch, EndpointDecisionBinding, and DecisionSupersessionRecord now freeze stale consequence in place and route through governed recovery.

gaps.title: Approval is generic task context
gaps.closureRule: ApprovalCheckpoint and ApprovalRequirementAssessment bind to one exact decisionEpochRef and supersede on material drift.

gaps.title: Self-care and admin endpoint meaning can drift from the boundary
gaps.closureRule: EndpointDecisionBinding and EndpointDecisionSettlement now require boundaryTupleHash continuity for self-care and admin rails.

gaps.title: Urgent escalation is just a note plus banner
gaps.closureRule: DutyEscalationRecord, UrgentContactAttempt, and UrgentEscalationOutcome now publish a typed urgent branch.

gaps.title: Downstream handoff seeds can launch from stale epochs
gaps.closureRule: BookingIntent and PharmacyIntent require decisionEpochRef and the latest decision supersession lineage.

gaps.title: Assistive-seeded consequence can bypass human approval burden
gaps.closureRule: Assistive-seeded submit_endpoint now requires pinned trust, feedback, source, final-human-artifact, and approval refs on the same epoch.

gaps.title: Outcome previews are detached pages
gaps.closureRule: EndpointOutcomePreviewArtifact and TriageOutcomePresentationArtifact now require ArtifactPresentationContract and OutboundNavigationGrant policy binding.
